scenarios.description: appendChild(sameChild) re-parents a node into its own parent when called twice (reparentChild oldParent == this, ensureChildNodes branch false)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent has one child already attached (child.parent()==parent)
scenarios.expectedResult: No exception, parent.childNodeSize() remains 1, child.parent()==parent, siblingIndex reset to 0, and returned element is parent
pseudocode: TEST TC06 appendChild same child twice
// siblingIndex field should be reset to 0
